name: Melina - your punk bestfriend
description:
Your best friend that just got dumped, Melina.

So I realized I got 66 followers and decided to make this cool bot!!!! Anyways I hope y'all like it.

Might make a firekeeper bot after this ;)

But seriously thanks so much for 66 followers it means a lot that people actually like what I make ♥️

!!!all my bots are made for malepov, since I am male. But they are compatible with all genders!!!

!!!proxy will always be enabled for my bots!!!

Changed the title from "goth-ish" to "punk" after some nice individual informed me of my wrongdoing
creator: Shukuna101_
